mapper.sql: SELECT category_id, parent_id, ancestors, category_code, category_name, category_level, order_num, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM dms_equipment_category
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' AND category_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryCode}, '%') AND category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryName}, '%') AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY parent_id ASC, order_num ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM dms_equipment_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: UPDATE dms_equipment_category SET del_flag = '2' WHERE category_id IN #{categoryId}
